---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for AutoClaw
title: "[feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What pain point or opportunity does this address? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

Sketch what the feature looks like from a driver’s point of view first, then from the developer/integrator point of view.

## Platform impact

- [ ] Android Auto
- [ ] Apple CarPlay
- [ ] Agent runtime (which?)
- [ ] Music sync
- [ ] Character renderer
- [ ] Steering-wheel controls
- [ ] Docs / examples only

## Safety considerations

Does the feature add anything that runs while the car is moving? If so, how does it stay within distraction guidelines?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why this one wins.
